text: A vessel's Fire Control plan shall have:

options.text: Blueprint files locked exclusively in the captain's office
A duplicate set of plans permanently stored outside the deck house in a prominent weatherproof enclosure
Microfiche summary records mounted inside all lifeboats
Plastic layout cards stapled on every accommodation deck door

explanation: SOLAS regulations require fire control plans to be readily accessible to crew and emergency responders. A duplicate set stored in a prominent, weatherproof enclosure outside the navigation bridge ensures vital information is available even if the bridge is inaccessible.
